records.title: Medical Records
records.subtitle: Access and manage your health documents

records.addAllergySub: Document allergens and reactions so they are always visible during care.

records.emptyStateBody: Add conditions, allergies, and vaccinations so your medical history is available throughout the patient experience.
records.footerDisclaimer: Keep this record current so future AI and care workflows can use accurate medical history automatically.

aiChat.sendError: Unable to send your question right now.
aiChat.recordUpdateOk: Your record updates were confirmed and will be used for future autofill.

aiChat.dismissed: Those chat-derived updates were dismissed for now.
aiChat.dismissFail: Unable to dismiss those updates right now.
aiChat.consentNote: Responses are AI-generated and not a substitute for professional medical advice.
aiChat.inputPh: Ask a question about your health...
aiChat.loadHistoryError: Unable to load your chat history right now. Please refresh and try again.
aiChat.reviewUpdatesBody: Confirm any patient record changes you want reused in future advice and autofill.

aiChat.inputPhLong: Ask a question or add context about your attachment...

guestAiChat.assistantLead: Get instant health guidance powered by medical knowledge. For appointments and records,
guestAiChat.inputPlaceholder: Ask me anything about your health...
guestAiChat.keyboardHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
guestAiChat.disclaimer: This AI assistant provides general health information only and is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of your physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition.
guestAiChat.welcomeMessage:
Hello! I'm your AI health assistant powered by advanced medical knowledge. I can help you:

• Understand symptoms and health concerns
• Get guidance on when to see a doctor
• Find the right specialist for your needs
• Answer general health questions
• Provide wellness tips

What can I help you with today?
guestAiChat.doctorBannerBody: This is the public health assistant. For your schedule, patients, and prescriptions, use your doctor portal.
